sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check blue block position after LEFT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue block: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
# Also check green bar
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
